action.command: cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task4-classic 2>&1 | tail -3 && cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | grep -E "总分|/100\.00 \[" | head -20

tool_call.name: terminal
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "cd /workspace/YatCC && cmake --build build -t task4-classic 2>&1 | tail -3 && cmake --build build -t task4-score 2>&1 | grep -E \"\u603b\u5206|/100\\.00 \\[\" | head -20", "security_risk": "MEDIUM", "summary": "Build and rescore", "timeout": 600}
